summary: Replayed ADR 0308 first from synchronized origin/main at repository version 0.177.136 and platform version 0.130.85, then rebased onto newer origin/main at repository version 0.177.137 and platform version 0.130.86 and re-verified the operator provisioning execution surface end to end. The workstream made operator-onboard preflight fail closed on dependency outages, repaired the Windmill gate-status and detached-worktree checkout path, fixed the shared Docker bridge-chain false failure that the exact-main Windmill converge exposed, recorded the refreshed docker-runtime SBOM snapshot, refreshed generated truth, and proved that the only remaining branch-local automation delta before merge-to-main is the intentional protected changelog update.

verification.observed: make preflight WORKFLOW=operator-onboard passed on the rebased exact-main tree at repository version 0.177.137 and proved the fail-closed health checks for Keycloak discovery, the private OpenBao mTLS listener, and the private Windmill API.

The rebased exact-main test bundle covering Docker bridge-chain retries, controller worktree path resolution, validation-gate Windmill contracts, operator-manager dry-run behavior, and the operator-onboard preflight controller path passed with 45 tests.

verification.check: Exact-main Windmill converge regression discovery, repair, and rebased replay
verification.observed: The first exact-main make converge-windmill env=production replay on 0.177.136 failed truthfully because the shared Docker nat-chain assertion evaluated stale post-retry state after the chain had already recovered. Refreshing the final nat and forward probes in collections/ansible_collections/lv3/platform/roles/common/tasks/docker_bridge_chains.yml removed the false failure, the repaired replay passed on 0.177.136, and the rebased replay on 0.177.137 then passed with docker-runtime-lv3 ok=331 changed=46 failed=0, postgres-lv3 ok=93 changed=2 failed=0, and proxmox_florin ok=41 changed=4 failed=0.

The rebased exact-main Windmill dry run against f/lv3/operator_onboard returned status ok, preserved the generated operator state path under /srv/proxmox_florin_server/.local/state/operator-access/, and resolved the managed roster path config/operators.yaml.

The controller-local fallback path succeeded from the detached git worktree after platform/repo.py learned how to resolve shared .local assets from the parent repository root, proving the controller can still inspect operator inventory through the Proxmox jump path on the rebased exact-main tree.

The final rebased branch-local closeout passed scripts/live_apply_receipts.py --validate, scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards, scripts/validate_repo.sh workstream-surfaces, and git diff --check after the receipt and workstream metadata were updated. scripts/validate_repo.sh generated-docs still truthfully isolates the single remaining branch-local delta on changelog.md, which is intentionally deferred to the protected mainline release step.

verification.check: Remote validate replay after generated artifact refresh
verification.observed: The first rebased remote-validate replay exposed stale build/platform-manifest.json after the new SBOM ownership surface landed. Refreshing build/platform-manifest.json and rerunning generate_diagrams.py restored generated truth, and the second rebased replay then passed every remote lane, including workstream-surfaces, schema-validation, dependency-graph, ansible-syntax, and iac-policy-scan.

verification.check: Pre-push gate closeout on branch-local truth
verification.observed: The rebased make pre-push-gate replay passed every heavy lane on both the remote primary path and the local fallback, including ansible-lint, semgrep-sast, security-scan, generated-portals, packer-validate, and integration-tests. The only remaining branch-local failure is generated-docs because changelog.md intentionally still reflects the pre-release truth until merge-to-main updates the protected release surfaces.

notes: The latest rebased exact-main replay source is 2592ab846fa95548e920eac10f28b17e0f818fae. The final branch closeout commit only records refreshed evidence, generated truth, and merge-safe workstream metadata on top of that replay source.

The first live platform implementation of ADR 0308 was already true on platform version 0.130.85; this receipt captures the contract corrections, the exact-main replays, and the repo automation needed to keep that live shape reproducible from source control while the synchronized verification base has advanced to repository version 0.177.137 and platform version 0.130.86.

Protected integration completed in repository version 0.177.138: VERSION, changelog.md, docs/release-notes/0.177.138.md, docs/release-notes/README.md, README.md, versions/stack.yaml, and build/platform-manifest.json were refreshed while platform_version correctly remained 0.130.86 because this release promoted already-live verification rather than a new live apply from main.

The rebased branch-local validation bundle intentionally isolated the pending changelog.md delta before the release write. After repo version 0.177.138 was cut, that delta was resolved in the integrated tree. The first release-manager write hit an Outline collections.list HTTP 502 during knowledge sync, so the final completion used the built-in LV3_SKIP_OUTLINE_SYNC=1 bypass.
